next_client_secret.description: The newly created secret that's next in rotation for the client. **Important:** this is the only time you will be able to view the `next_client_secret`. Be sure to persist the `next_client_secret` in a secure location. If the `next_client_secret` is lost, you will need to trigger a secret rotation flow to receive another one.

client_name.description: A human-readable name for the client.

client_description.description: A human-readable description for the client.

status.description: The status of the client - either `active` or `inactive`.

scopes.description: An array of scopes assigned to the client.

client_secret_last_four.description: The last four characters of the client secret.

trusted_metadata.description: An arbitrary JSON object for storing application-specific data.

next_client_secret_last_four.description: The last four characters of the `next_client_secret`. Null if no `next_client_secret` exists.
